model_description: Transparent factor-based scoring. Weights: BKFC record 18%, recent form 14%, KO rate 13%, age 12%, reach 10%, MMA background 8%, style matchup 8%, activity 7%, cut susceptibility 6%, strength of schedule 5%, experience 5%, height 4%. Combined via normalized weighted sum → logistic. Pseudo-bayesian record smoothing. Activity + cut susceptibility + strength-of-schedule derived from event history. Style matchup uses manually curated style_tags. Outputs: advantage_a/b (0-100 per fighter, sums to 100) and predictability (0-100 aggregate trust metric).
